steps.title: Identify the subject structure
steps.content: The subject is compound—a state's voting record and polling data (two items joined by 'and'). The phrase not its population size in commas is a contrasting element that clarifies but doesn't change the subject's plurality.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: A compound subject joined by 'and' requires a plural verb form. The plural present tense is determine—the other choices use a singular verb (A, B) or a participle (C). That matches choice D — D is correct.
